inputs.high_level_description: A candid, amateur-style mirror selfie of a German woman with platinum blonde hair, posing with an alluring expression in an indoor setting.
inputs.background: indoor domestic setting, muted ambient tones, slightly out of focus
inputs.style.photo: high-resolution smartphone capture, 24mm wide-angle lens, 15-degree Dutch angle tilt to the left
inputs.aesthetics: raw, intimate, candid, spontaneous, handheld smartphone photography, social media aesthetic
inputs.lighting: natural indoor ambient lighting, soft specular highlights on skin, healthy glow, diffused shadows
inputs.elements_data: [{"type":"obj","text":"","desc":"18-year-old German teen, slender physique, long platinum blonde hair with loose strands, blue eyes, alluring expression, bare nude torso with plump chest exposed and well defined areolas, wearing pink velour shorts with a 'Hello Kitty' motif","palette":[],"x":0.057042860021294925,"y":0.11722407195787882,"w":0.84,"h":0.83},{"type":"obj","text":"","desc":"rose gold smartphone, dual-camera module, held in right hand at shoulder level, reflecting in the mirror","palette":[],"x":0.5622041305596485,"y":0.3283943756840953,"w":0.12,"h":0.13},{"type":"obj","text":"","desc":"full-length mirror reflecting the subject, creating a sense of depth and self-contained narrative","palette":[],"x":0,"y":0,"w":1,"h":1}]

inputs.text: {"high_level_description":"An amateur photograph from 1981 depicting a surreal scene in the sky: a MiG-27 fighter jet engaged in combat with a flying saucer, showing an explosion from a cruise missile on the saucer and a laser beam intercepted by the fighter, which also carries a red star on its fuselage. The image includes a handwritten 'ОСОБОЙ ВАЖНОСТИ' stamp in the corner, typical of official or classified documents of that era.","style_description":{"aesthetics":"surreal, low-resolution, grainy, film-like, high contrast, amateur handheld","lighting":"dramatic overhead lighting with strong shadows, artificial glow from explosion","photo":"found footage aesthetic, grainy analog film texture, slight color shifts, visible camera shake","medium":"photograph","color_palette":["#FF4D4D","#222222","#8B0000","#000000","#D3D3D3","#FFD700","#696969"]},"compositional_deconstruction":{"background":"A wide, slightly blurred sky background with a distant horizon, showing a dynamic aerial battle scene. The sky is divided by a diagonal line of intense light and shadow from the explosion.","elements":[{"type":"obj","bbox":[80,100,600,900],"desc":"A MiG-27 fighter jet flying at an angle, mid-action, with a red star insignia on its fuselage. The jet is angled slightly upward and dodging a laser beam from the left.","color_palette":["#FF4D4D","#222222","#8B0000"]},{"type":"obj","bbox":[200,400,550,800],"desc":"A flying saucer with a rounded, metallic shape, showing a large explosion burst from its side, visible as a bright orange and white flash. The saucer is tilted slightly downward, with debris in the background.","color_palette":["#FFD700","#FF4D4D","#8B0000"]},{"type":"obj","bbox":[150,500,300,700],"desc":"A beam of red and white laser light shooting from the flying saucer toward the MiG-27, intersecting at a diagonal angle, highlighting the action and tension.","color_palette":["#FF4D4D","#FFFFFF"]},{"type":"text","bbox":[900,10,950,300],"text":"ОСОБОЙ ВАЖНОСТИ","desc":"Handwritten, faded red stamp in small block letters, placed in the bottom-left corner, with slight shadow and texture to suggest film age.","color_palette":["#FF4D4D","#000000"]}]}}
